characters.name: Blaze Bolt
characters.bio: Blaze Bolt is a fearless speedster who loves helping friends feel brave. Blaze practices fast starts and always cheers for every racer.
characters.favorite_activity: Sprint races at the Race Center

characters.name: Finn Tide
characters.bio: Finn Tide is a calm ocean explorer who treats every turn like a rolling wave. Finn loves discovering new places and guiding friends.

characters.name: Nova Spark
characters.bio: Nova Spark is a curious young inventor who builds bright ideas into racing adventures. Nova asks questions and finds creative solutions.
characters.favorite_activity: Creating inventions in the Learning Lab

characters.name: Dash Rocket
characters.bio: Dash Rocket is an upbeat adventurer who loves finding friendly new paths. Dash makes every trip feel like an exciting expedition.
